_note: Final s per Loth 1866 (traced from chart): single continuous stroke from baseline-left up through a lower curl, then around an upper loop, terminating inside that loop. Both 'kringels' are within or above baseline — there is no descender in this Loth depiction. No forward coupling — final position only — so the renderer hides the 'out' marker; the exit field stores the terminus point for visualisation, the connection engine ignores it.
